title: centaurea × hajdoae
intro: Centaurea × hajdoae, also known as Hajdú centaury, is a hybrid plant of the Centaurea genus, combining the characteristics of Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea scabiosa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × hajdoae include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
